title_en: Battle of the Broths: Homemade vs. Bouillon Cubes
title_es: Batalla de los Caldos: Casero vs. Cubitos de Caldo
hook_en: Which broth is better for your health? Let's find out!
hook_es: ¿Cuál caldo es mejor para tu salud? ¡Descubramos!
key_message: Homemade chicken broth is a healthier choice with less sodium and no artificial additives compared to bouillon cubes.
visual_elements: Side-by-side comparison of homemade broth vs. bouillon cube packaging
Close-up of pouring homemade broth into a bowl
Close-up of dissolving a bouillon cube in hot water
Overlay text: Sodium content: Homemade 40mg vs. Bouillon cube 900mg
_source_food_context: • HEALTHY: Homemade chicken broth (chicken, vegetables, herbs) vs. PROCESSED: Bouillon cubes (MSG, sodium, artificial flavors) — A single bouillon cube can contain 900mg sodium — nearly half daily limit

title_en: MSG vs. Fresh Herbs: What's in Your Broth?
title_es: MSG vs. Hierbas Frescas: ¿Qué Hay en Tu Caldo?
hook_en: MSG or fresh herbs? What's hiding in your broth?
hook_es: ¿MSG o hierbas frescas? ¿Qué se esconde en tu caldo?
key_message: Bouillon cubes contain MSG and artificial flavors, while homemade broth uses only fresh herbs and ingredients.
visual_elements: Two separate bowls of broth: one with fresh herbs, one labeled with MSG
Overlay text: 'MSG and artificial flavors' pointing to bouillon cube broth
Clip of chopping fresh herbs for homemade broth
Zoom-in on ingredient list of bouillon cube packaging showing 'MSG'
_source_food_context: • HEALTHY: Homemade chicken broth (chicken, vegetables, herbs) vs. PROCESSED: Bouillon cubes (MSG, sodium, artificial flavors) — A single bouillon cube can contain 900mg sodium — nearly half daily limit
